title: Ability to change hyperlink name anywhere within Monday.
excerpt: We would like to request the ability to customize the display name of hyperlinks anywhere within Monday, particularly in surveys, so that the display name appears instead of the actual hyperlink. While this feature works…

posts.author: kbloomz (Kelly Lambeth)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to request the ability to customize the display name of hyperlinks anywhere within Monday, particularly in surveys, so that the display name appears instead of the actual hyperlink. While this feature works in the link portion of the survey, we would love to extend this functionality to other sections. Specifically, we would like to include a link in a “single select question,” allowing our customers to watch a video linked video (that is labeled with a title and not a hyperlink) or complete a task, and then select “completed” to indicate they have done so.
